'''Ganash''' was a violet [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was the fifth world in the [[Both system]], and was orbited by fourteen [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was named for a character in [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] mythology.
